title: JavaScript Framework Bundle Size Comparison 2026
description: Compare the minified and gzipped sizes, downloads, and popularity of modern JS frameworks. Original research by siliconbased.dev.

@graph.headline: JavaScript Framework Bundle Size Comparison 2026
@graph.description: An original research study analyzing the bundle sizes, downloads, and popularity of 8 modern JavaScript frameworks.

mainEntity.name: Which JavaScript framework has the smallest bundle size in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Based on our analysis, React has the smallest minified bundle size at 7.42 KB.

mainEntity.name: How big is React vs Vue?

acceptedAnswer.text: React and Vue have significantly different core bundle architectures. Please check the data table for the exact latest measurements of their core packages.

mainEntity.name: Are newer frameworks like Solid or Svelte actually smaller?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, compile-time frameworks like Svelte and Solid typically produce much smaller initial core bundles because they do not ship a heavy virtual DOM runtime to the browser.

mainEntity.name: Does bundle size still matter in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. While average network speeds have increased, JavaScript parsing and execution time on mobile devices remains a significant bottleneck for web performance.

mainEntity.name: How is this framework size data collected?

acceptedAnswer.text: We crawl live data from Bundlephobia for minified and gzipped core sizes, the npm registry for weekly download metrics, and GitHub for repository stars and language data.
